description: iY7() async Statsig recheck can call WK(1,"bypass_permissions_disabled") mid-session, process-exiting the CLI when Anthropic flips tengu_disable_bypass_permissions_mode server-side. Short-circuit to no-op.
note: Legacy (<=2.1.112) symbol name. Equivalent behavior covered by v2.1.114 name-agnostic patches. Kept for backward compat.
